channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: OHV extending into pavement, 12th July
item.description:
OHV from wall extending into pavement in this area, particularly next to railings/pedestrian crossing but whole area needs attention. Please cannot all be chopped back.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayes Lane, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Erith - Pier Road /Colebrook Street/James Watt Way, 12th July
item.description:
Accumulated rubbish & leaves have been ignored by cleaning contractor - This is the third request for some action please ! Pavement sweeping is necessary.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): James Watt Way, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped couch, 12th July
item.description:
Dumped couch outside 283 Woolwich Road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree crumbling with large rotting crack, 12th July
item.description:
The tree near the alleyway that leads to the garages for 14 Oak Tree Gardens and the neighbouring houses, which has had branches randomly fall off in the past, has a massive crack running almost from the roots to the branches. When I touched the tree to check for stability, a chunk of the bark came off in my hand. When standing close to the tree, it is audibly creaking as if the outer, roadside section is likely falling away and has the potential to fall into the road as well as nearby cars

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leamington Avenue, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of dogs mess bags left on/ near pole, 12th July
item.description:
Lots of dog mess bags left by this post

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sparrows Lane, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime hire bikes parked dangerously and blocked off the pavement, 12th July
item.description:
Overcrowded lime hire bikes parked dangerously and blocked off the pavement. Outside Cafe Concerto on Haymarket.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 225/229, Piccadilly, Mayfair, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass, 12th July
item.description:
There is a pane of glass that has been broken outside 123 croydon road on the pavement. it is dangerous and there are shards of glass everywhere.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping Holstein Way, 12th July
item.description:
Flytipping under the stairs next to 82 Holstein Way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Button needs to be pressed a lot of times and with a lot of force, 12th July
item.description:
It will eventually work if I press it say 20 times but also I need to use a lot of force when pressing it (to the point my fingers hurt)
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Homesdale Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
